description_long: This is a shallow, oval-shaped woven picnic basket with a wide opening and gently sloping sides. The basket features a sturdy rim and two integrated handles on opposite sides, crafted from the same woven material and reinforced for easy carrying. The exterior displays a decorative pattern with interwoven strands in natural beige, purple, and yellow hues, creating a visually appealing design. The weave is moderately tight, providing both structure and a glimpse of the basket's interior. The handles are fixed and seamlessly blend into the rim, while the basket lacks a lid or closure mechanism. The overall appearance suggests a lightweight, functional item suitable for carrying food or small personal belongings in outdoor urban settings.
description: A shallow, oval woven picnic basket with fixed side handles and a decorative multicolored pattern. The basket is open-topped and features a sturdy rim with no lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oval shape, wide opening, and both fixed handles integrated into the rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the basket and the curvature of the rim and handles.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying the opposite side of the oval basket and the second handle.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite angle, again showing the basket's depth and the structure of the rim and handles.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, oval-shaped woven handles integrated into the rim on opposite sides; made of the same wicker material.
attribute_weave_pattern: Moderately tight, plain weave with decorative color bands and slight variations in strand thickness.
